summary: News announcement that Cavallo Hoof Boots became the official hoof boots of riding associations ACTHA, ATHRA, and the British Horse Society TREC division, plus the RFD TV show Best of America by Horseback.

Post inviting riders to Best of America by Horseback's 1000th-episode celebration trail ride in Cleveland, Ohio, noting Cavallo's long partnership and BOABH's effort to contact every past trail rider.
Announcement that Cavallo Hoof Boots received a Stamp of Approval from Liberated Horsemanship, the hoof-care training organization founded by Dr. Bruce Nock, with commentary on the barefoot movement.
Customer testimonial from Lyndal Odom (Florida) about always carrying Cavallo hoof boots on canopy trails to protect horses from roots and limbs, including loaning a spare pair to another rider.
Testimonial from trainer Debbie Gumm (Arizona) on using Cavallo hoof boots across disciplines including Western Pleasure, showmanship, trail, English, and ranch work over three years.
Testimonial from Dana Jones (Oregon) about Gunner, a 21-year-old Tennessee Walking Horse, transitioning from steel shoes to Cavallo hoof boots and gaiting comfortably on gravel with no rubbing.

Event recap of Amerequine at Will Rogers Memorial Center in Fort Worth, Texas, where Carole Herder presented 'The Benefits of Barefoot' and demonstrated fitting Cavallo boots on a rescue mare named Taffy.

Event post about Carole Herder meeting trainer/clinician Cyndy Branham of R&D Ranch at the Amerequine Expo in Fort Worth, Texas, highlighting Cyndy's mustang-makeover achievements and praise for Cavallo.
Testimonial from Janet (San Pedro, California) about using Cavallo Simple Hoof Boots for trail riding and dressage with her barefoot horse Chuey, noting longer, more suspended strides.
Testimonial from Kristy about fitting Cavallo hoof boots on her hard-to-fit Gypsy Vanner horse Emo, who now trots on gravel without stumbling and wears them in parades.
Testimonial from Amy Gosnell (Leicester, NC) about Cavallo Simple Hoof Boots protecting her horse's sensitive front feet on gravel roads, plus praise for easy sizing exchange.
Testimonial from Leslie Berro (Davidson, NC) about fitting Cavallo Sport Hoof Boots on her 16.1hh Friesian Gunnar for comfort and security during demos on unknown footing.
